label: autoimmune peripheral neuropathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system that results in peripheral neuropathy.

label: autoimmune uveitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of eyes, ear, nose and throat that is located_in the uvea.

label: autoimmune optic neuritis
definition: An autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system that is located_in the neuron projection bundle connecting eye with brain.

label: autoimmune gastritis
definition: An autoimmune disease of gastrointestinal tract that is located_in the stomach.

label: autoimmune pancreatitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system that is located_in the pancreas.

label: juvenile ankylosing spondylitis
definition: An ankylosing spondylitis with onset during childhood.

label: drug-induced lupus erythematosus
definition: A lupus erythematosus caused by chronic use of certain drugs.
exact_synonym: DIL | DILE

label: autoimmune glomerulonephritis
definition: An autoimmune disease of urogenital tract that is located_in the renal glomerulus.

label: autoimmune cardiomyopathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by deterioration of the function of the heart muscle.

label: autoimmune atherosclerosis
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by a build up of plaque in the arteries.

label: autoimmune vasculitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by inflammation of the blood vessels.

label: pemphigus gestationis
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by blistered skin as a result of self-reactive T and B cells that target BP180.

label: Hirata disease
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system characterized by hypoglycemia caused by antibodies to insulin.
exact_synonym: insulin autoimmune syndrome

label: autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome type 1
definition: An autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome that is inherited in an autosomal recessive fashion, which is characterized by abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes auto-reactivity against endocrine organs.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune Polyglandular Syndrome I | Whitaker syndrome | autoimmune polyendocrinopathy-candidiasis-ectodermal dystrophy

label: autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome type 2
definition: An autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome that is characterized by abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes auto-reactivity against endocrine organs. It is more heterogeneous and has not been linked to one gene.
exact_synonym: Schmidt syndrome

label: cutaneous lupus erythematosus
definition: A lupus erythematosus that causes skin lesions on parts of the body that are exposed to sunlight.

label: Lambert-Eaton myasthenic syndrome
definition: A neuromuscular junction disease that is characterized by an abnormality of acetylcholine (ACh) release at the neuromuscular junction which results from an autoimmune attack against voltage-gated calcium channels (VGCC) on the presynaptic motor nerve terminal.
exact_synonym: Eaton-Lambert syndrome | LEMS | Lambert-Eaton syndrome

label: Hailey-Hailey disease
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by recurring blistering most commonly occurring in the folds of the skin, particularly the groin and axillary regions, and has_material_basis_in mutations in the ATP2C1 gene that result in loss of adhesion within the skin. Other sites of the body, such as the neck, perianal, and submammary regions, may likewise be affected.
exact_synonym: BENIGN CHRONIC PEMPHIGUS | Pemphigus, Benign Familial

label: secondary progressive multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by a worsening of disability, rather than by relapses followed by recovery, which progressively worsens until a steady progression of disability replaces the cycles of attacks.
exact_synonym: SPMS | Secondary-progressive MS

label: primary progressive multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by steady worsening of neurologic functioning, without any distinct relapses or periods of remission. The rate of progression may vary over time, with occasional plateaus or temporary improvements, but the progression is continuous.
exact_synonym: PPMS | Primary-progressive MS

label: progressive relapsing multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by steadily worsening symptoms and attacks during periods of remission with disease progression from the onset.
exact_synonym: PRMS | Progressive-relapsing MS

label: autoimmune disease of central nervous system
definition: An autoimmune hypersensitivity disease located_in the central nervous system.

label: autoimmune disease of endocrine system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system resulting in production of antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the endocrine system.

label: autoimmune disease of exocrine system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the exocrine system.

label: autoimmune disease of eyes, ear, nose and throat
definition: An autoimmune disease located_in eyes, located_in ears, located_in nose and located_in throat.

label: autoimmune disease of gastrointestinal tract
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the gastrointestinal tract.

label: autoimmune disease of musculoskeletal system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the musculoskeletal system.

label: autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system
definition: An autoimmune disease of the nervous system that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the peripheral nervous system.

label: autoimmune disease of skin and connective tissue
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the skin and connective tissue.

label: autoimmune disease of urogenital tract
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the urogenital tract.

label: autoimmune disease of blood
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the blood.

label: autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the cardiovascular system.

label: diffuse alopecia areata
definition: An alopecia areata that involves diffuse loss of hair over the whole scalp.

label: Balo concentric sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by concentric layers of demyelinated tissues, tumor-like lesions larger than two centimeters and symptoms similar to those of a brain tumor.
exact_synonym: Balo disease | Balo's concentric sclerosis | Tumefactive multiple sclerosis

label: Chilblain lupus
definition: A cutaneous form of systemic lupus erythermatosus that is characterized by painful nodular skin lesions precipitated by variation in temperatures, has_material_basis_in autosomal dominant inheritance of mutation in the TREX1 gene.

label: autoimmune neuropathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of central nervous system caused by an autoimmune response.

label: pemphigus vulgaris
definition: A pemphigus characterized by autosomal dominant blisters and erosions on the skin and mucous membranes erosions cause by autoantibodies to intercellular cement substance.
exact_synonym: familial pemphigus vulgaris

label: infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease
definition: An autoimmune disease characterized by systemic autoimmune manifestations with infantile onset.

label: infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease 1
definition: An infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease characterized by early childhood onset of a spectrum of autoimmune disorders affecting multiple organs that has_material_basis_in heterozygous gain of function mutation in the STAT3 gene on chromosome 17q21.

label: infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease 2
definition: An infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease that has_material_basis_in compound heterozygous mutation in the ZAP70 gene on chromosome 2q12.

label: infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease 3
definition: An infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease characterized by the onset of various systemic autoimmune manifestations in the first months or years of life that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the CBLB gene on chromosome 3q13.

label: infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease 4
definition: An infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease characterized by onset of various autoimmune diseases in early childhood that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the PDCD1 gene on chromosome 2q37.

label: infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease 5
definition: An infantile onset multisystem autoimmune disease characterized predominantly by neonatal-onset type 1 diabetes mellitus due to complete insulin deficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the PDL1 gene on chromosome 9p24.

label: IgG4-related disease
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by tumefactive lesions, a dense lymphoplasmacytic infiltrate rich in IgG4-positive plasma cells, storiform fibrosis, obliterative phlebitis, autoimmune pancreatitis, and sometimes elevated serum IgG4 levels affecting various organs.

label: ankylosing spondylitis 1
definition: A ankylosing spondylitis that has_material_basis_in variation in the HLA-B27 allele on chromosome 6p21.3.

label: ankylosing spondylitis 2
definition: A ankylosing spondylitis that has_material_basis_in variation in the HLA-B27 allele on chromosome 9q31-q34.

label: ankylosing spondylitis 3
definition: A ankylosing spondylitis that has_material_basis_in variation in the HLA-B allele on chromosome 2q36.1-q36.3.

label: autoimmune cholangitis
definition: An autoimmune hepatitis that is characterized by primary biliary cirrhosis clinical, biochemical, and histologic characteristics with antinuclear antibody positive sera.
exact_synonym: autoimmune cholangiopathy

label: antisynthetase syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by myositis, arthralgia, Raynaud phenomenon, mechanic hands, interstitial lung disease, and serum autoantibodies to aminoacyl transfer RNA synthetases.

label: autoimmune myocarditis
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by inflammation of the heart muscle.

label: pemphigoid
definition: An autoimmune disease of skin and connective tissue that is characterized by subepidermal blistering especially in the lower abdomen, groin, and flexor surfaces of the extremities, creating tense blisters that do not break easily.

label: pemphigus foliaceus
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by blistering lesions on otherwise healthy-looking skin.
exact_synonym: pemphigus foliaceous

label: IgA pemphigus
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by painful and pruritic vesiculopustular eruptions. These eruptions form as a result of circulating IgA antibodies against keratinocyte cell surface components responsible for cell to cell adherence.

label: paraneoplastic pemphigus
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by painful blisters and denuded areas of the mouth, lips, oesophagus and skin.

label: Graves ophthalmopathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of eyes, ear, nose and throat that is characterized by upper eyelid retraction, lid lag, swelling, redness, conjunctivitis, and bulging eyes.
exact_synonym: Graves orbitopathy | Thyroid associated ophthalmopathy | thyroid eye disease

label: autoimmune interstitial lung, joint, and kidney disease
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by interstitial lung disease, inflammatory arthritis, and immune complex-mediated renal disease and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the COPA gene on chromosome 1q23.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune interstitial lung disease-arthritis syndrome | COPA syndrome | autoinflammation and autoimmunity, Systemic with immune dysregulation | systemic autoinflammation and autoimmunity with immune dysregulation 1

label: PFAPA syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by recurrent febrile episodes associated with aphthous stomatitis, pharyngitis and cervical adenitis.
exact_synonym: Marshall syndrome with periodic fever | Periodic fever-aphtous stomatitis-pharyngitis-adenopathy syndrome

label: CINCA Syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease characterized by neonatal onset of cutaneous symptoms, chronic meningitis, and joint manifestations with recurrent fever and inflammation that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the NLRP3 gene on chromosome 1q.
exact_synonym: IOMID syndrome | NOMID syndrome | Prieur-Griscelli syndrome | chronic infantile neurological cutaneous articular syndrome | chronic neurologic cutaneous and articular syndrome | cryopyrin-associated periodic syndrome 3 | infantile-onset multisystem inflammatory disease | neonatal-onset multisystem inflammatory disease

label: immune dysregulation-polyendocrinopathy-enteropathy-X-linked syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by onset in infancy of refractory diarrhea, endocrinopathies, type 1 diabetes mellitus, and dermatitis that has_material_basis_in X-linked recessive mutation in the forkhead box P3 (FOXP3) gene on chromosome Xp11.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune enteropathy type 1 | DMSD | IDDM-secretory diarrhea syndrome | IPEX | X-linked autoimmunity-allergic dysregulation syndrome | XLAAD | XPID | autoimmunity-immunodeficiency syndrome, X-linked | diabetes mellitus, congenital insulin-dependent, with fatal secretory diarrhea | diarrhea, polyendocrinopathy, fatal infection syndrome, X-linked | immunodeficiency, polyendocrinopathy, and enteropathy, X-linked | immunodysregulation, polyendocrinopathy, and enteropathy, X-Linked

label: STING-associated vasculopathy with onset in infancy
definition: An autoimmune disease of the cardiovascular system characterized by onset in infancy of autoinflammatory vasculopathy causing severe skin lesions, particularly affecting the face, ears, nose, and digits, and resulting in ulceration, eschar formation, necrosis, and, in some cases, amputation that has_material_basis_in heterozygous gain of function mutation in the TMEM173 gene on chromosome 5q31.
exact_synonym: SAVI

label: celiac disease
definition: An autoimmune disease of gastrointestinal tract that is caused by a reaction located_in small intestine to gliadin, a prolamin (gluten protein) found in wheat, and similar proteins found in the crops of the tribe Triticeae. The disease is associated with HLA-DQ gene. It has_symptom abdominal pain, has_symptom constipation, has_symptom diarrhea, has_symptom nausea and vomiting, and has_symptom loss of appetite.
exact_synonym: celiac sprue | coeliac disease | idiopathic steatorrhea
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: Felty's syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that results_in rheumatoid arthritis, splenomegaly and neutropenia.
exact_synonym: Felty syndrome | Rheumatoid arthritis with splenoadenomegaly and leukopenia

label: cicatricial pemphigoid
definition: A pemphigoid that is characterized by skin lesions and scaring and located_in mucous membranes and located_in skin.
exact_synonym: Cicatricial pemphigoid with ocular involvement | Ocular pemphigoid | benign mucous membrane pemphigoid | benign mucous membrane pemphigoid with ocular involvement | ocular pemphigus

label: granulomatosis with polyangiitis
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by necrotizing granulomatous inflammation of the upper and lower respiratory tract, glomerulonephritis, vasculitis, and the presence of antineutrophil cytoplasmatic autoantibodies (ANCAs) in patient sera, and is located_in lung, located_in kidney, located_in skin resulting from an autoimmune attack by antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibodies against small and medium-size blood vessels.
exact_synonym: Necrotizing respiratory granulomatosis | Wegener granulomatosis, formerly

label: Vogt-Koyanagi-Harada disease
definition: An autoimmune disease that is caused by T helper cell mediated autoimmune attack of melanocytes resulting in inflammation of the inside of the eye, whitening of hair, skin pigment loss, and meningitis.
exact_synonym: Harada's disease | Vogt-Koyanagi syndrome | uveomeningoencephalitic syndrome

label: vitiligo
definition: An autoimmune disease that causes depigmentation of patches of skin resulting from loss of function or death of melanoctyes.

label: Graves' disease
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system that involves production of excessive amount of thyroid hormones, located_in thyroid gland.
exact_synonym: Grave's disease | Graves disease | exophthalmic goiter
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: Guillain-Barre syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system that causes body's immune system to attack part of the peripheral nervous system.
exact_synonym: Infectious neuronitis | Post-infectious polyneuritis | Postinfectious polyneuritis | acute infective polyneuritis | acute inflammatory demyelinating polyradiculopathy | acute postinfectious polyneuropathy

label: Miller Fisher syndrome
definition: A Guillain-Barre syndrome that manifests as a descending paralysis. It usually affects the eye muscles first and presents with the triad of ophthalmoplegia, ataxia, and areflexia.
exact_synonym: Fisher's syndrome | Miller-Fisher variant of Guillain-Barre syndrome

label: Sjogren's syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that involves attack of immune cells which destroy the exocrine glands that produce tears and saliva.
exact_synonym: Sicca syndrome | Sjogren syndrome | xerodermosteosis

label: Mikulicz disease
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by chronic enlargement of the glands of the head and neck, has_symptom lumps of the face and neck, dry eyes, dry mouth, and intermittent fever, and is often associated with an underlying autoimmune disorder, hematologic malignancy, tuberculosis infection, or syphilis infection.
exact_synonym: IgG4-related dacryoadenitis and sialadenitis | Mikulicz's disease

label: Jaccoud's syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by severe non-erosive arthropathy with ulnar deviation of the 2nd to 5th digits and metacarpophalangeal joint subluxation without evidence of synovitis, and may be associated with systemic lupus erythematosus, rheumatic fever, and ligamentous laxity.
exact_synonym: Jaccoud syndrome

label: Behcet's disease
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by mucocutaneous manifestations, including recurrent oral and genital ulcerations, ocular manifestations, especially chronic relapsing uveitis, and systemic vasculitis involving arteries and veins of all sizes.
exact_synonym: Adamantiades-Behcet disease | Behcet syndrome | Behet's syndrome | triple symptom complex

label: autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system characterized by abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes auto-reactivity against endocrine organs.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune polyglandular failure | Lloyd's syndrome | autoimmune polyendocrinopathy

label: pemphigoid gestationis
definition: A pemphigoid that is characterized by erythematous papules, vesicles, and plaques around the trunk and extremities that develop during pregnancy, particularly during the second and third trimesters, has_symptom pruritis, and has_material_basis_in autoantibodies to the basement membrane, which triggers a complement cascade and attracts eosinophils to the subepidermis.
exact_synonym: Gestational herpes | herpes gestationis

label: autoimmune hepatitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of gastrointestinal tract that results_in inflammation located_in liver caused by the body's immune system attacking the liver cells.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune chronic active hepatitis | autoimmune hepatitis with centrilobular necrosis

label: multiple sclerosis
definition: A demyelinating disease that involves damage to the fatty myelin sheaths around the axons of the brain and spinal cord resulting in demyelination and scarring.
exact_synonym: Generalized multiple sclerosis | insular sclerosis

label: relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by relapse (attacks of symptom flare-ups) followed by remission (periods of recovery). Symptoms may vary from mild to severe, and relapses and remissions may last for days or months. More than 80 percent of people who have MS begin with relapsing-remitting cycles.
exact_synonym: RRMS | Relapsing-remitting MS

label: antiphospholipid syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by recurrent venous or arterial thrombosis and/or fetal losses associated with characteristic elevated levels of antibodies directed against membrane anionic phospholipids (anticardiolipin).
exact_synonym: APS | antiphospholipid antibody syndrome

label: myasthenia gravis
definition: An autoimmune disease of the nervous system that has_material_basis_in antibodies to acetylcholine receptors at the neuromuscular junction, has_symptom ptosis, has_symptom diplopia, has_symptom dysphagia, has_symptom dysarthria, has_symptom muscle weakness and has_symptom shortness of breath.

label: autoimmune disease of the nervous system
definition: An autoimmune disease affecting the nervous system.

label: anti-basement membrane glomerulonephritis
definition: A Goodpasture syndrome that is characterized by damage to only kidney capillaries.
exact_synonym: anti-GBM glomerulonephritis

label: chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyradiculoneuropathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system that is characterized by inflammation of nerve roots and peripheral nerves and destruction of the fatty protective covering (myelin sheath) over the nerves. This affects how fast the nerve signals are transmitted and leads to loss of nerve fibers.

label: ankylosing spondylitis
definition: An arthritis that results_in inflammation in the joints of the spine and pelvis. The disease has_symptom pain, has_symptom stiffness in the spine, has_symptom stiffness in the neck, has_symptom stiffness in the hips, has_symptom stiffness in the jaw and has_symptom stiffness in the rib cage.
exact_synonym: Bekhterev syndrome | Bekhterev's disease | Marie-Strumpell disease

label: autoimmune thyroiditis
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system that involves inflammation located_in thyroid gland caused by the immune system reacting against its own tissues.
exact_synonym: Chronic Lymphocytic Thyroiditis | Hashimoto thyroiditis | Hashimoto's Disease | Hashimoto's syndrome | Hashimoto's thyroiditis | Lymphocytic Thyroiditis

label: bullous pemphigoid
definition: A pemphigoid that is characterized by large blisters.

label: lupus erythematosus
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by a constellation of findings that include elevated antibodies to nuclear antigens, antiphospholipids, low complement levels, ulcers, non-scarring alopecia, renal or neurologic damage, and low white blood cell and platelet counts, has_symptom rashes, fatigue, arthritis, hair loss, seizures, and symptoms related to affected organs.
exact_synonym: lupus

label: neuromyelitis optica
definition: A central nervous system disease characterized by inflammation of the optic nerve (optic neuritis) and inflammation of the spinal cord (myelitis).
exact_synonym: Devic's disease | Devic's syndrome

label: autoimmune thrombocytopenic purpura
definition: A primary thrombocytopenia that involves relatively few platelets in blood as a result of autoantibodies.
exact_synonym: Immune thrombocytopenic purpura | idiopathic thrombocytopenic purpura | primary thrombocytopenic purpura
related_synonym: Ideopath thrombocytopenic pur | Idiopathic purpura | werlhof's disease

label: systemic lupus erythematosus
definition: A lupus erythematosus that is an inflammation of connective tissue marked by skin rashes, joint pain and swelling, inflammation of the kidneys and inflammation of the tissue surrounding the heart.
exact_synonym: Lupus Erythematosus, systemic | SLE - Lupus Erythematosus, systemic | disseminated lupus erythematosus

label: pemphigus
definition: An autoimmune disease of skin and connective tissue that is characterized by blistering of the outer layer of the skin and mucous membranes (mouth, nose, throat, eyes, and genitals), causing lesions and blisters that are easily ruptured.

label: Goodpasture syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by antibody attack of the basement membrane in lungs and kidneys, leading to bleeding from the lungs and kidney failure.
exact_synonym: anti-GBM disease | anti-glomerular basement membrane disease

label: alopecia areata
definition: An autoimmune disease resulting in the loss of hair on the scalp and elsewhere on the body initially causing bald spots.
exact_synonym: Circumscribed alopecia
